Class representing assessment scales using in a gradebook

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
AssessmentScaleId

The id of the assessment scale

 integer

None.
Title

The title of the assessment scale

 string

None.
AssessmentTotals

Flag indicate if this scale should be participated in overall average calculation.

None.
